mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS total_members, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings WHERE deletedAt IS NULL) AS total_meetings, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = "PENDING") AS pending_reports, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sports) AS total_sports

SELECT u.userId, u.loginId, u.nickname, CASE WHEN r.regionId IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', r.dong) END AS region_name, u.role, u.status FROM users u LEFT JOIN regions r ON u.regionId = r.regionId ORDER BY u.userId DESC

SELECT m.meetingId, m.title, s.name AS sport_name, CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', r.dong) AS region_name, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meeting_participants mp WHERE mp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp.status = 'APPROVED' ) AS approved_count, m.maxMembers, m.status, u.nickname AS host_nickname FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId WHERE m.deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY m.meetingId DESC
SELECT reportId, reason, status, createdAt FROM reports ORDER BY reportId DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, processedAt = NOW() WHERE reportId = #{reportId}
